title: asperula neglecta var. nitens
intro: Asperula neglecta var. nitens, commonly known as Wood Sorrel, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and skin problems. The health benefits of Wood Sorrel include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Wood Sorrel can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
